g.text: Nominal SMBUS communication in interrupt mode
Step 2: transmits a buffer in a non-blocking mode using interrupt.
Step 3: waits for the I2C interrupt: write transfer completed.
Step 4: receives a buffer in a non-blocking mode using interrupt.
Step 5: waits for the I2C interrupt: read transfer completed.
Step 6: checks that the sent and received buffer match.
Steps repeated if no error occurs.
reports the success status by turning on the status led.
